code:
import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    mut skipping = true
    while skipping
      if i >= n
        skipping = false
      else
        match string.byte_at(s, i)
        when Some(b)
          if is_ws(b)
            i = i + 1
          else
            skipping = false
          end
        when None
          skipping = false
        end
      end
    end
    if i < n
      mut sign = 1
      match string.byte_at(s, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 45
          sign = -1
          i = i + 1
        else if b == 43
          i = i + 1
        else
          ()
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      mut val = 0
      mut reading = true
      while reading
        if i >= n
          reading = false
        else
          match string.byte_at(s, i)
          when Some(b)
            if b >= 48 and b <= 57
              val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
              i = i + 1
            else
              reading = false
            end
          when None
            reading = false
          end
        end
      end
      result = list.push(result, sign * val)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn pick(_ xs: List<Int>, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match xs.get(i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
end

let text = io.read_to_end()
let ints = parse_ints(text)
let a = pick(ints, 0)
let b = pick(ints, 1)
let s = pick(ints, 2)

mut out = ""
mut v = a
mut first = true
while v < b
  if first
    out = "#{v}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
  v = v + s
end
println(out)
